---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement.
title: "feat: <short, imperative, ≤ 50 chars>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

<!-- Title follows commit convention: feat(scope): subject. See docs/workflow/01-git.md section 2. -->

## Problem

<!-- What's the pain or gap? Who experiences it? Describe the problem before the solution — the solution is easier to critique once the problem is clear. -->



## Proposed solution

<!-- What you think should be built. Keep it solution-y but not implementation-detailed. -->



## Alternatives considered

<!-- At least one rejected alternative with a reason. Forces deeper thinking; matches ADR structure (docs/_meta/templates/ADR.md). -->

- **<Alternative 1>** — rejected because …
- **<Alternative 2>** — rejected because …

## Scope & constraints

<!-- Out-of-scope for this feature. Known constraints (deadlines, compatibility, budget). -->

- In scope:
- Out of scope:
- Constraints:

## Definition of done

<!-- How do we know when this is shipped? Objective, verifiable. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Linked context

<!-- Related issues, PRs, ADRs, product docs, user feedback. -->

-

For non-trivial architectural changes, this issue may need an ADR before implementation.
See docs/_meta/governance.md section 4 and docs/_meta/templates/ADR.md.
